pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation-api dependency to jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 requires Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; using javax.annotation will cause runtime linkage errors or missing class exceptions if the application relies on annotations like @Generated or @Nullable from this package in a Spring Boot 3 context.
